Our Story

A legacy of craftsmanship, a passion for perfection

The GloveStory was born from a passion for timeless craftsmanship and contemporary design. Founded in 2009, our journey began in a small workshop in Milan, where master artisans dedicated their lives to the art of glove making.

Each pair of our gloves is handcrafted by skilled artisans with decades of experience, using only the finest Italian leathers and premium materials. We believe that luxury should be felt, not just seen — that's why we pay meticulous attention to every stitch, every edge, and every detail.

Our commitment to quality extends beyond our products. We strive to create a community of discerning individuals who appreciate the art of fine craftsmanship and understand that true luxury lies in the details.

🎨

Artistry

Every glove tells a story through the hands that crafted it
